speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — no, this one's clean as a whistle. No major accidents, no frame damage, nothing like that. It's been well-maintained by families who really cared for it. You can tell by how tight everything still feels. The only thing it's got is normal wear and tear from being driven the way these Tahoes are meant to be driven — on road trips and family adventures.

args.message: Great questions! No accidents—this Tahoe's got a clean history, all dealer-serviced records to back it up. As for mileage, at 142,000 miles, this one's actually right in the sweet spot. For a 2016 SUV, you're looking at typical wear around 120–150k by now, so this is practically babied. Tahoes run strong well past 200k if they're maintained right, and ours has been. You're getting a solid, reliable platform here.
